   "reasoning": "School is a luxury I can barely afford. I don't need more empty promises or 'incentives' for teachers who'd still leave as soon as a private job comes knocking. What I need is a steady income, real support from my family, and a chance to finish school without dropping my job. A decent scholarship to avoid crippling debt would be a start.",
